title: Verify end-to-end user registration, email verification, and successful login
description: Tests the complete happy path for a new user, from creating an account and verifying their email to successfully logging in for the first time.
preconditions: User has a valid, unused email address.
User can access the inbox for the specified email.

steps.description: 3. Enter a password that meets all security criteria (e.g., 'ValidPass1!').
6. Check the email inbox for the verification email.
7. Click the verification link within the email.
8. After being redirected, navigate to the login page.
9. Enter the newly registered email and password.

expected_result: User account is created, the email is verified, and the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the application dashboard.
